title: Aurora, 61352, Palm Pals Nibbles Squirrel, 5In, Soft Toy, Brown & Beige
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Squirrel cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: This cute Squirrel named Nibbles fits into the palm of your hand he is full of beans which makes him super soft and cuddly His body is a soft red brown plush material Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion whether it is for a birthday or Christmas everyone will fall in love with this adorable Elephant Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products
